task_completion.description: Access the JFrog Artifactory web interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open showing the JFrog Artifactory login screen or dashboard with 'localhost:8082' in the address bar.

task_completion.description: Select Maven as the package type for the new remote repository
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'New Remote Repository' creation screen is visible with the 'Maven' package type icon selected or highlighted.
The text 'maven-central-proxy' is typed into the 'Repository Key' input field in the repository configuration form.
The text 'https://repo1.maven.org/maven2' is typed into the 'URL' or 'Remote URL' input field.
The text 'Proxy for Maven Central Repository' is typed into the 'Description' or 'Public Description' input field.

task_completion.description: Save and create the remote repository
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks 'Save & Finish' or 'Create', followed by a success notification or the 'maven-central-proxy' repository appearing in the list of remote repositories.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to configure the repository
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration steps are performed within a web browser UI, not by typing API commands (like curl) into a terminal.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine JFrog Artifactory application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the authentic JFrog Artifactory web interface with its standard menus and styling, not a mock page or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a script to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent writing or executing a Python, Bash, or other script to interact with the Artifactory REST API directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target Artifactory instance is at http://localhost:8082. The agent must create a 'Remote' repository. The required configuration is: Package Type = 'Maven', Repository Key = 'maven-central-proxy', URL = 'https://repo1.maven.org/maven2', and Description = 'Proxy for Maven Central Repository'.
